item.title: They've declared war on women, let's strike back.
item.description: I keep seeing posts of new and more biologically and medically ignorant state laws passing like hotcakes on a cold day. The worst part of so many of these laws is that they are absolutely death sentences for commonplace medical issues during many pregnancies. Ectopic Pregnancies, miscarriages that result in not all of the fetus passing, septic uterus... far too many necessary medical issues are lumped under the umbrella of abortion and will be criminalized forcing women to go without proper needful care. Meaning many women absolutely will die unnecessarily in the coming months and possibly years. We should begin an initiative, a class?-action suit, whatever it takes to sue the states and lawmakers pushing for these death-laws.
item.dc:creator: Aelonwy

item.title: Down another 10 lbs! ?
item.description:
I had to come back and update on my progress!!! Another 10 lbs down!!30 lbs total. 30/5'7/227 lbs first pic 207 lbs second pic, 197 third pic. Goal 160 lbs. Just some good ole calorie counting and walking on the treadmill 1 hour a day 4 days a week! Almost halfway there?
Start of my journey and now?

item.title: aita
item.description: this is a bit of a story, but the jist of it is this: i am a 34 year old male that has a 13 year old sister. my sister lives with me, i drive her places. anyway, my 13 year old sister calls me to pick her up from a new frinds house, in a gated community at 12 am on saturday, i dont mind, i go and see the entrace to the community (in california, right outside the bay area) has a big sign that reads: "US drivers license required to enter". now, i want to stress this, i will always ALWAYS pick fights with HOAs if i can. i show my drivers license, go in, and pick my sister up. anyway, sunday comes by and my sister asks me to take her back to her friends house, sure, i dont mind. in passing a drop my drivers license off at home, and grab my SPANISH drivers license, and my romanian passport (i also have american drivers license and american passport) and go. the guard asks me for ID, i show my spanish license, and romanian passport. i get told that im not allowed in. i ask him if the home owner called in that they are expecting me, he says yes, they have, but i cant go in because the HOA doesnt want illegals working in the development. word for word what he said. i offered to let my sister walk alone to the house, he said thats not allowed because of liability to the development. i want to stress that i live for these types of confrontations. i tell my sister that if she wants to get to her friends house, she can get out of the car and walk, and that neither the gate guy nor the security can touch her since neither are police. Around this time the gate guy realized he is in over his head and asked me to wait a minute while he calls his supervisor. i oblige, he cant reach anyone, its sunday. he doubles down, illegals not allowed in development. i counter with "what about tourists? are you guys this daft that you think tourists dont exist" and guess what? his face lights up like a christmas tree. "no one claimed to be a tourist before, let me try to call my supervisor again" no answer, finally "i will let you guys in this time and i will bring this situation up at the next board meeting" i know what im doing next weekend. anyway, im an asshole, i know, but am i really THE asshole in this one? Most viral edit: omg I made most viral. I love u guys.
item.dc:creator: Vamp13

item.title: Governer Assclown strikes again. It's a race to the bottom and we're winning!! Suck it Florida!
item.description: Texas HB 20 makes it illegal for social media companies with more than 50 million monthly subscribers (Facebook and Twitter) to remove content from their platforms. Essentially, they can't moderate their own platforms. A federal judge struck it down but the federal appeals court upheld the law. So much for the first amendment. We are so fucked. Can we please vote him out now?

item.title: Defund the white supremacist network
item.description: I don't know a lot of ppl who still have satellite/cable, but if you do, please refuse to help pay for Fox News' hate. You can also use this website if you just want to petition your cable/satellite provider to drop Fox News https://unfoxmycablebox.com/ MV edit: for all you folks dissing cable/satellite subscribers, please consider there are wide swaths of the rural US where switching to streaming isn't possible bc there's NO BROADBAND. And these are many of Fox News' biggest fans. Not a coincidence. Support rural broadband initiatives pls
item.dc:creator: dojustice

item.title: If you understand this joke, you understand why Voter ID laws are stupid.
item.description: Voter ID laws prevent people from voting, and have zero measurable benefit. ETA: Thank you so much for your support! Please follow us on Facebook at "Americans For Election Reform" and on Twitter at @ReformAmericans I have never and will never ask for money.
